name: supplyfaraway
description: Monorepo runner — installs and runs the backend + frontend together.

scripts.postinstall: npm install --prefix backend && npm install --prefix frontend
scripts.dev: concurrently -k -n backend,frontend -c blue,magenta "npm --prefix backend run dev" "npm --prefix frontend run dev"
scripts.build: npm --prefix backend run build && npm --prefix frontend run build
scripts.start: concurrently -k -n backend,frontend -c blue,magenta "npm --prefix backend run start" "npm --prefix frontend run preview"
